Organ transplants tracked on-line

June 1995
Health & EnvironmentData & DatabasesInvestigative Methods

The United Network for Organ Sharing, a federally funded non-profit organization, maintains a comprehensive online database providing public access to organ transplant data including donation statistics, survival rates, and waiting list information.

The United Network for Organ Sharing, a federally funded non-profit that tracks transplant surgery, offers an Internet site filled with data. It includes information on organ donations, survival rates and waiting lists. The site is http://www.infi.net/~shreorg/unos.html
